message:
test(dir,extent): add edge-case tests for dx_hash distribution and extent unwritten lifecycle

Adds 8 new tests covering previously untested edge cases:

ffs-dir (4 tests):
- Verify distinct names produce distinct dx_hash values (collision rate)
- Verify different seeds change hash output
- Verify single-byte printable ASCII names have good distribution
- Verify 255-byte names (ext4 max) do not panic

ffs-extent (4 tests):
- mark_written on already-written extent is idempotent
- mark_written on empty tree is a no-op
- punch_hole inside unwritten extent frees blocks correctly
- Full unwritten lifecycle: allocate -> mark partial written -> truncate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
